cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, sir! Is this Mr. Chaitanya Gowda? Haan, I'm calling from Digit Insurance.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, this is Chaitanya. Ji, what's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, great to connect with you, sir! We're calling to remind you that as a valued customer of Digit Insurance, you're eligible for a free annual health check-up.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, that sounds good. Thik hai, how do I go about booking it?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, it's very simple. You can book your appointment through our official app. I can guide you through the process, if you'd like.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, please go ahead. I'm not very tech-savvy, ji.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 60s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.
